name: European Mocha Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Butter the bottom and sides of two 9-inch round baking pans.
3. Line the bottoms with wax paper; butter the paper.
4. In a small saucepan, melt the butter over low heat.
5. Remove from heat and stir in cocoa, blending well. Let cool slightly.
6. In a large mixing bowl, beat eggs until foamy. Add salt and vanilla.
7. Gradually add sugar, beating well.
8. Add the cooled chocolate mixture; blend thoroughly.
9. Fold in flour and pecans.
10. Pour batter into prepared pans.
11. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Do not overbake.
12. Cool for 5 minutes, then remove from pans.
13. Carefully peel off the paper. Let cool completely.
14. Spread Creamy Coffee Filling between layers, over top and sides of cake.
15. Garnish with chocolate curls if desired. Chill for 1 hour or longer before serving.
YIELD: 10 to 12 servings
CREAMY COFFEE FILLING: In a small bowl, combine all ingredients. Stir until the coffee is almost dissolved. Beat until stiff.
MAKE AHEAD DIRECTIONS: The cooled cake may be wrapped and frozen up to 4 weeks. Thaw, wrapped, before filling and frosting.
